name: opland
summary: Opland brings DEX, lending, and LP yield discovery into a self-custodial execution layer. Agents propose strategies; principal stays inside the user Safe.
members: ethan has been in crypto since 2018 and previously worked on DeFi trading and Web3 security research at Amber Group / OKX / Binance. Now full-time on Opland, he is focused on letting automation operate market-making strategies without taking keys, custody, or arbitrary transfer rights.
